info.title: UN World Population Data Portal API
info.description: The United Nations Population Division Data Portal API provides access to comprehensive demographic data including population estimates and projections, fertility, mortality, and migration indicators for all countries and areas of the world. Data is sourced from the World Population Prospects and other UN Population Division publications.

get.summary: Get population data by indicators and locations
get.description: Returns data for a given set of Indicators, Locations, StartYear, EndYear, StartAge, EndAge, Variants, Sexes and Categories.

parameters.name: indicators
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Indicator IDs or short names (e.g., '49' for total population, or 'TPopulation1Jan').

parameters.name: locations
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Location codes (ISO3, ISO2, or M49 numeric codes, e.g., 'USA;GBR' or '840;826').

parameters.name: startYear
parameters.description: Start year for the data range.

parameters.name: endYear
parameters.description: End year for the data range.

parameters.name: variants
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Variant IDs (e.g., '4' for medium variant).

parameters.name: sexes
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Sex IDs.

parameters.name: ages
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Age IDs.

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Category IDs.

parameters.name: pagingInHeader
parameters.description: If true, paging information is returned in response headers instead of the body.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format: json (default), xml, or csv.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name for sorting. Prefix with '-' for descending order.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid bearer token.

404.description: Not found - indicator or location codes do not exist.

get.summary: Get population data by indicators, locations, and year range
get.description: Returns data for a given set of Indicators, Locations, StartYear and EndYear.

parameters.name: indicators
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Indicator IDs or short names.

parameters.name: locations
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Location codes.

parameters.name: startYear
parameters.description: Start year for the data range.

parameters.name: endYear
parameters.description: End year for the data range.

parameters.name: variants
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Variant IDs.

parameters.name: sexes
parameters.description: Comma or semicolon separated list of Sex IDs.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format: json, xml, or csv.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name for sorting. Prefix with '-' for descending.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page.

get.description: Returns a paged list of all active Indicators including population, fertility, mortality, and migration indicators.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name for sorting. Prefix with '-' for descending. Defaults to 'id'.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format: json, xml, or csv.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Records per page.

get.description: Returns a list of Indicators filtered by one or more codes that can be Indicator IDs or short names, separated by semicolons or commas.

parameters.name: codes
parameters.description: Semicolon or comma separated Indicator IDs (e.g., '1;24;19') or short names (e.g., 'TPopulation1Jan;TFR5').

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name for sorting.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format: json, xml, or csv.

get.description: Returns a paged list of all Locations (countries and areas).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name for sorting.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format: json, xml, or csv.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Records per page.

get.description: Returns a list of Locations filtered by one or more codes (ISO3, ISO2, or M49 numeric codes) separated by semicolons or commas.

parameters.name: codes
parameters.description: Semicolon or comma separated location codes: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 (e.g., 'USA;GBR'), alpha-2 (e.g., 'US;GB'), or M49 numeric (e.g., '840;826').

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name for sorting.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format: json, xml, or csv.

get.description: Returns a list of all Locations including aggregate regions (e.g., World, continents, income groups) sorted by the specified parameter.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field name for sorting.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format: json, xml, or csv.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Records per page.

200.description: List of all locations with aggregates.

get.description: Returns a list of all available time periods of the specified type.

parameters.name: timeType
parameters.description: Type of time dimension to retrieve.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format.

get.description: Returns a list of all available projection Variants (e.g., Medium, High, Low fertility variants).

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format.

post.description: Requests a bearer token to be generated. The token is required for accessing all data endpoints.

MainDataSetFullDto.description: Full dataset record containing population indicator data.

sex.description: Sex category (e.g., Both Sexes, Male, Female).

value.description: Data value (population count, rate, ratio, etc.).

dimAge.description: Whether this indicator has an age dimension.

dimSex.description: Whether this indicator has a sex dimension.

dimVariant.description: Whether this indicator has projection variants.

VariantDto.description: Projection variant definition (e.g., Medium, High, Low).

AgeMetadataDto.description: Age group metadata for an indicator.

CategoryMetadataDto.description: Category or sex metadata for an indicator.

TokenRequestDto.description: Request body for obtaining an API bearer token.

token.description: JWT bearer token for API access.

ProblemDetails.description: RFC 7807 problem details for error responses.

BearerAuth.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Obtain a token via the /api/token/request endpoint.

tags.name: Data
tags.description: Population data retrieval endpoints for estimates and projections.

tags.name: Metadata
tags.description: Metadata about available dimensions for indicators.
